breaking.title: Russian strikes kill nine in Ukraine and damage historic cathedral, officials say
breaking.summary: A Ukrainian drone attack in the Russian city of Tula, south of Moscow, killed three people and wounded three others.

breaking.title: 'He has no judgement': Trump 'pissed off' with Netanyahu over Israeli strike in Lebanon 'hour before the deal'
breaking.summary: US President Donald Trump announced a finalized deal with Iran to end their conflict, despite a last-minute Israeli strike in Beirut that he claims nearly derailed the agreement. Trump expressed anger at Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu's actions, calling them "f*****g attack" with "no f*****g judgement." Despite the tensions, the deal is set for signing, with Iran still vowing retaliation.

breaking.title: Trump celebrates 80th birthday with Iran deal and UFC cage fight at White House
breaking.summary: Donald Trump and UFC chief Dana White walked together from the Oval Office to the Blue Room Balcony to survey the Octagon and stood for the National Anthem as fighter jets thundered overhead. The crowd chanted “USA! USA!”

breaking.title: Rupee rises 58 paise to 94.60 against U.S. dollar in early trade
breaking.summary: At the interbank foreign exchange, the rupee opened at 94.70 against the U.S. dollar before rising further to 94.60, up 58 paise from its previous close.

breaking.title: G7 leaders meet in France after U.S. and Iran declare agreement to end war
breaking.summary: Discussing next steps on Iran ⁠will be one of several issues the global leaders will wrestle with during the June 15-17 summit, which will also seek common ground on the war in Ukraine

breaking.title: Bidadi Township: Tussle turns intense as HDK attacks CM over wealth, terms him ‘real estate baron’
breaking.summary: Mr. Kumaraswamy said the industrial townships developed in Gujarat were built on dry and uncultivable land, while the Bidadi township is proposed on ‘fertile agricultural land wrested from farmers’

breaking.title: Software Engineer, 27, Dies During Office Party At Telangana Farmhouse
breaking.summary: A 27-year-old software engineer was found dead after a weekend party at a Telangana farmhouse.

breaking.title: Holiday averts tragedy as school roof collapses in Aland taluk
breaking.summary: The school was closed for the weekly holiday
